notes: The published entry guide states that Overview and Details may be shared publicly if the entry is selected.

routes.label: General entry
routes.applies_when: Professional or student entry using the standard written submission structure.

fields.label: Designer
fields.drafting_instructions: Use confirmed designer credit exactly as it should appear publicly.

fields.label: Client
fields.drafting_instructions: Use the confirmed commissioning client or manufacturer name.

fields.label: Overview
fields.drafting_instructions: Provide a self-contained public overview of the problem, design response, and value.

fields.label: Details
fields.drafting_instructions: Explain the process, design decisions, innovations, execution, and verified outcomes in enough depth for jury review.

fields.label: Team credits
fields.drafting_instructions: List confirmed names and roles exactly as authorized.

fields.label: External link
fields.drafting_instructions: Use a stable, accessible project or video URL.
